message:
⏪ revert: remove modulePreload config (restores Vite defaults) (#2905)

Reverts #2901 and #2904. The modulePreload filtering didn't help cold
load times and may have made things worse by creating runtime
waterfalls. Restore Vite's default behavior (preload all chunks).

The actual cold load performance issue needs a different approach
(code-splitting, lazy card loading) — not preload hint tweaks.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
